name: fixture-02-program-manager-enterprise-it
description: Enterprise IT program manager from a Fortune 500 insurance carrier applying to an internal cloud-transformation PMO lead role at a healthcare payer. Strong overlap on regulated-industry transformation; the stretch is healthcare domain fluency.

resume_data.name: Priya Venkatesan
key_achievements: Led 22-month mainframe-to-cloud migration for the claims platform — $84M program, 140+ engineers across 11 squads, delivered on committed outcome targets for latency and $19M annualized run-cost.
Stood up the PMO operating model (intake, capacity, outcome scoreboard) adopted by 4 sister programs.
Chaired the program steering committee with the CIO + CFO; turned a red-status program green in 90 days by replanning outcome milestones around deliverable risk, not activity.

requirements: Demonstrated leadership of enterprise-wide cloud transformation programs in a regulated industry
Experience running a PMO as the accountable leader, not as an individual contributor PM
Fluency with HIPAA + HITRUST control environments preferred
Executive communication cadence — monthly steering, quarterly board updates
Change management muscle — this is a high-resistance environment
culture_cues: collaborative but evidence-heavy — don't walk in without data

letter_plan.opening_hook: Open with the $84M claims-platform migration — same regulated industry, same mainframe-to-cloud shape, same steering-committee cadence — to establish the program is running at the scale and regulatory complexity Meridian needs.
body_points: $84M migration at the claims-platform level is a direct analog to Meridian's work — insurance claims processing shares HIPAA-adjacent regulatory posture and outcome risk profile with payer claims, so the playbook transfers with HIPAA-specific tailoring.
PMO stand-up (intake, capacity, outcome scoreboard) is exactly the Director, Enterprise PMO scope — position this as existing PMO leadership experience, not aspirational.
Red-to-green turnaround shows the change management muscle the JD flags; in a consensus culture, the outcome-milestone replanning approach is the kind of data-heavy proof point that lands.
letter_plan.closing_strategy: Acknowledge the HIPAA/HITRUST learning curve directly (carrier background covers SOX + PCI; the payer control set is a near-neighbor) and close on the match between the claims-migration outcome discipline and Meridian's mission focus.
